title: Domain Map
description: Groups every concept note by knowledge area: mathematics, statistics, information retrieval, representation learning, machine learning, and biomedical.
open_questions: Should BM25 live under information retrieval or statistics, given it depends on corpus-level statistical properties?
Where does the corpus statistics gap note belong — information retrieval or representation learning?
Should biomedical domain concepts be split into general (UMLS, ontology mapping) and project-specific?
